channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: US to send $1.25 billion in weapons to Ukraine, in push to get aid out before leaving office
item.description: U.S. officials say the United States is expected to announce it will send another $1.25 billion in military assistance to Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor And Matthew Lee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US sanctions the founder of Georgia's ruling political party
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration has imposed sanctions on the founder of Georgia’s ruling political party, which has steered the country away from a pro-Western stance and towards Russia, U.S. officials said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Middle East latest: Israeli soldiers burn a hospital in Gaza
item.description: Israeli soldiers stormed and burned a hospital in isolated northern Gaza after forcibly removing staff and patients on Friday, Health Ministry officials said. The Israeli military said the hospital was being used by Hamas fighters as a base, although it did not provide evidence.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bird flu virus in Louisiana patient likely mutated to be more transmissible, CDC says
item.description: The agency, in its latest update released Thursday, said the mutations were not found in samples taken from wild birds, suggesting the virus changed over the course of the patient’s infection.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Azerbaijani and U.S. officials suggest plane that crashed may have been hit by weapons fire
item.description: Russian air defense systems may have brought down an Azerbaijani airliner this week, a U.S. official said Friday after an Azerbaijani minister also suggested the plane was hit by a weapon, citing expert analysis and survivor accounts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missing dog returned to family home and rang the doorbell
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — After a nearly weeklong search, Athena found her way home to her Florida family in time for Christmas Eve and even rang the doorbell. Athena, a 4-year-old German Shepherd and Husky mix, escaped her home in Green Cove Springs, Florida, on Dec.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: These movies are some of 2025's most anticipated
item.description: With the vast majority of 2024 in the rearview mirror, it's time to start looking at the most anticipated films primed to take the silver screen in 2025. Full of adaptations, sequels, and reboots of beloved properties, viewers will not have difficulty finding something familiar to enjoy.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pennsylvania teacher jailed in Russia formally designated as wrongfully detained
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An American schoolteacher arrested in Russia on drug charges more than four years ago has been designated by the U.S. government as wrongfully detained, the State Department said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mexico tests app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: U.S. authorities are obliged to give notice to home-country consulates when a foreign citizen is detained. Mexico says it has beefed up consular staff and legal aid to help migrants in the legal process related to deportation.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Former NCAA quarterback Tommy Lazzaro dies in 'tragic' accident at US Air Force base
item.description: Tommy Lazzaro, an Army sergeant and former quarterback for the Central Michigan Chippewas, has died following an accident at Eglin Air Force Base in Florida. He was 27.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Onion-wielding man disrupts Christmas church services, pours whiskey into holy water: deputies
item.description: A man was arrested and charged after disrupting religious services at two Maryland Catholic churches on Christmas Eve, according to the St. Mary's County Sherriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Musk stirs pot on X over 'shortage' of talented American engineers
item.description: Musk, an immigrant from South Africa, posted to X that there is a shortage of "talented" engineers in the U.S. and companies should start looking to other countries.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: China sanctions 7 companies over US military assistance to Taiwan
item.description: The sanctions also come in response to the recent approval of the U.S. government's annual defense spending bill, which a Chinese Foreign Ministry statement said “includes multiple negative sections on China.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Most blame insurance profits and denials alongside the killer in UHC CEO death: poll
item.description: Most Americans believe health insurance profits and coverage denials share responsibility for the killing of UnitedHealthcare's CEO — although not as much as the person who pulled the trigger, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: New 2025 laws hit hot topics from AI in movies to rapid-fire guns
item.description: New laws taking effect with the new year will affect Hollywood actors, social media stars and chatty motorists.
item.dc:creator: David A. Lieb, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Man arrested for disrupting Christmas church services, pouring whiskey into holy water: deputies
item.description: Authorities in Maryland said a man has been arrested after he disrupted services at two local churches on Christmas Eve and endangered citizens.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Getting too close to first responders will soon be a crime in Florida
item.description: Florida will soon have a so-called “Halo Law” meant to protect first responders. The new law, starting in January, creates a 25 feet buffer zone around law enforcement officers, firefighters, and emergency medical crews.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian ministers head to Palm Beach for talks with incoming Trump administration
item.description: Two top Canadian Cabinet ministers are visiting Palm Beach to talk border security and trade with officials in the incoming Donald Trump administration as Trump threatens tariffs on all Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: Rob Gillies, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Powerful thunderstorms rumble across Texas, delaying holiday travel
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Some flights were delayed or canceled in Texas on Thursday after a line of thunderstorms started moving across parts of the state in a system the National Weather Service predicted could bring high winds, hail and possible tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Career criminal, 31, arrested for 35th time
item.description: A Florida man and career criminal was arrested for his 35th time right before Christmas, after stealing a car and attempting to escape authorities in a high-speed chase.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Was 2024 the best year? Here's where Americans stand
item.description: Personal development emerged as a key theme in 2024, with 67% of respondents reporting growth over the year.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Florida woman arrested after allegedly breaking in, stabbing person over pizza delivery tip
item.description: Armed with a knife, the suspect began attacking one of the victims, allegedly upset about the tip she received during an earlier delivery, deputies said.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pope calls for nations to overcome divisions in Christmas address as communities celebrate worldwide
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — Pope Francis in his traditional Christmas message on Wednesday urged “all people of all nations” to find courage during this Holy Year “to silence the sounds of arms and overcome divisions” plaguing the world, from the Middle East to Ukraine, Africa to Asia.
item.dc:creator: SILVIA STELLACCI and COLLEEN BARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Bergey, a Pro Bowl linebacker for the Eagles, dies at 79
item.description: Bill Bergey, a five-time Pro Bowl linebacker who played in a Super Bowl for the Philadelphia Eagles, died Wednesday, the team announced. He was 79.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Snowy owl rescued from car grille by Minnesota woman who saved another bird hours earlier
item.description: Annabell Whelan woke up Tuesday and frantically checked on her holiday overnight guest — Nowl the snowy owl, who she rescued from the grille of a car the day before.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH FINGERHUT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackpot for Mega Millions over $1 billion after no numbers match on Christmas Eve drawing
item.description: Hang onto those stocking-stuffer lottery tickets. The Mega Millions jackpot has surpassed $1 billion after no ticket matched all six numbers drawn on Christmas Eve.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: American Airlines technical issue, bad weather leads to flight delays
item.description: About 1,000 American Airlines flights were delayed as of Tuesday afternoon, according to FlightAware.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5
